description: Reconstruction metadata for the exact protocol and supervisor bytes frozen at activation. Final review hardened the published files without rewriting the observed run; each adjacent patch applies directly to the corresponding published file and the recorded non-destructive command emits the at-activation bytes.

post_run_changes: non-overlapping and empty workspace/mirror activation gate
fail-closed worker cleanup when termination evidence writes fail

interrupt-safe shutdown for KeyboardInterrupt, SIGTERM, and SIGHUP including deferred pre-fork-to-Popen-registration signals, signal-guarded local cleanup and ownership transfer, outer retry ownership for unproven survivors, repeated signals, isolated per-process termination failures, stable visibility-verified Linux terminal-only worker-session classification after raw-existence-driven process-group signaling, survivor verification, and worker-log close failures
chronology-only header correction distinguishing initial preregistration from the pre-activation permission amendment
termination-evidence safety exception prioritizing worker shutdown before reporting incomplete evidence

operator-interrupt and SIGTERM/SIGHUP routing including deferred pre-fork-to-Popen-registration signals, signal-guarded local cleanup and ownership transfer, outer retry ownership for unproven survivors, repeated-signal shielding, per-process termination isolation, stable visibility-verified Linux terminal-only worker-session classification after raw-existence-driven process-group signaling, survivor verification, and worker-log close failure semantics
